title: Skill Directory Structure
description: Interactive Mermaid visualization for skill directory structure
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: educational technology
data visualization
mermaid
learningObjectives: Identify SKILL.md as the required entry-point file at the root of every Claude skill directory
Describe the purpose of each standard subdirectory: scripts, templates, references, and examples
Decide which subdirectory a new supporting file belongs in, such as a runnable script versus a fill-in template versus reference documentation
Reproduce the standard directory tree when scaffolding a new Claude skill
